pr.title: Non-record: 11L PR315 Backout + Native FA3 RunPod (val_bpb=1.1247)

output.summary: PR315-style 11-layer Partial-RoPE GPT with LN-scale, EMA, XSA4, Backout residual, native Hopper FlashAttention, and torch.compile on 8×H100 SXM.
techniques: PR315-style 11-layer Partial-RoPE Transformer with LN-scale, EMA, and XSA4
Backout residual plus late QAT int6 training using native FA3 and torch.compile on 8×H100 SXM
Inline FlashAttention helper to keep train_gpt.py self-contained
